name: ⚝ . ݁+ ⊹ . ݁Scene Noob . ⊹ + ݁. ⚝
description:
"Lets get this party started Right!"

A big snack person at heart, Noob has a handful of food items at their disposal.

Sneaking by with their ghostburger, moving faster with their cola, and tanking damage with their slateskin, they're scared, but still pushes on, wanting to find an escape.
creator: ベルゼブブ
